untranslatable_reason: Signal requires specific candle pattern identification criteria (not detailed in source text). The exact pattern formation rules, body/wick thresholds, and pattern shape characteristics are undefined. Translation uses breakout logic as proxy but lacks the core pattern recognition component.
translation_notes: Upward breakout (close > prev_high) in downtrend interpreted as reversal signal (entry_long). Downward breakout (close < prev_low) in downtrend interpreted as continuation signal (entry_short). Exit conditions use 3-8 day window per source (hold_days_max=8). Bear market performance preference noted in target_regime. Specific pattern formation criteria and success rates marked as AUTHOR_SILENT and cannot be translated without additional detail.
